query: Map an existing workflow from a page button click through backend processing to the rendered result. Produce the Context List, Actions Reference, and sequence diagram.
expected_behavior: Produces exactly the three core breadboard artifacts: Context List, Actions Reference, and sequence diagram
Uses real action names and distinguishes UI actions from system actions
Shows control flow and data output separately in the sequence diagram
Treats the backend or external system boundary as a context when it participates in the flow
